_comment: Ground truth calibration scores. Human expert scores with inter-rater agreement.

samples.label: High-quality implementation

plumbing_porcelain_separation.reasoning: Clean separation across objects.py, index.py, refs.py, commands/. One minor leak in cmd_log.

object_model_abstraction.reasoning: Clean Blob/Tree/Commit dataclasses with serialize/deserialize. Tree sorting inline is a minor gap.

naming_consistency.reasoning: Highly consistent naming throughout. Minor: one test file uses 'hash' instead of 'sha'.

test_quality.reasoning: Good Tier 1-2 coverage with filesystem verification. Tier 3 gaps and no binary tests.

scope_discipline.reasoning: Builds exactly what was asked. --help flag is acceptable small addition.

samples.notes: All rater agreements within 10 points. Well-calibrated sample.

samples.label: Low-quality implementation

plumbing_porcelain_separation.reasoning: Single 800-line file. No separation of any kind. SHA computation scattered with different formulas.

object_model_abstraction.reasoning: No object model. Tree is just a JSON dict. Multiple inconsistent SHA formulas.

naming_consistency.reasoning: Mixed do_/run_/git_ prefixes. Inconsistent sha/hash/commit_id naming.

test_quality.reasoning: Tests exist but only check exit codes. No filesystem verification. Happy-path only.

scope_discipline.reasoning: All requested commands present but added gc, config, and --porcelain. Moderate over-build.

samples.notes: All rater agreements within 10 points. Well-calibrated sample.
